--- Page 4 ---
Datasheet
All-in-One PCs: A Comprehensive Overview
All-in-one (AIO) PCs represent a unique category within the world of personal computers, 
offering a blend of functionality, aesthetics, and space-saving design. Unlike traditional 
desktop computers with separate towers and monitors, AIOs integrate all the essential 
components into a single unit, typically behind the display screen. This design approach 
results in a cleaner, less cluttered workspace and a more streamlined computing 
experience.
Voltriq – AI300R
Conclusion
All-in-one PCs offer a compelling combination of functionality, aesthetics, and space-
saving design. They are a great option for users who prioritize a clean and clutter-free 
workspace, appreciate stylish design, and need a computer for everyday tasks. However, 
it's important to consider their limitations in terms of upgradability and potential 
performance constraints before making a purchase decision. If you're looking for a 
computer that's easy to use, looks great, and saves space, an all-in-one PC might be the 
perfect choice for you.

--- Page 5 ---
Who Should Consider an All-in-One PC?
Users with limited space: AIOs are perfect for those who need a computer but have limited desk space.
Users who prioritize aesthetics: If you want a computer that looks good in your workspace, an AIO can be a 
stylish option.
Users who need a simple and easy-to-use computer: AIOs are ideal for those who want a hassle-free 
computing experience with minimal setup.
Users who need a central home computer: AIOs can be a great choice for families who need a computer for 
general use, web browsing, and entertainment.
Voltriq – AI300R
Datasheet
Key Features and Characteristics
Integrated Design: The defining feature of an AIO is its integration of the computer's processing unit, display, 
speakers, and often even the webcam into one cohesive unit. This eliminates the need for a separate tower, 
reducing cable clutter and saving valuable desk space.
Space Efficiency: AIOs are ideal for users with limited desk space or those who prefer a minimalist setup. 
Their compact design makes them suitable for small offices, apartments, or even as a central home computer.
Aesthetics: AIOs are often designed with aesthetics in mind, featuring sleek profiles and modern designs that 
can complement any environment. Many models prioritize visual appeal, making them a stylish addition to any 
workspace.
User-Friendliness: AIOs are generally easy to set up and use. With fewer cables to connect and a more 
integrated design, they offer a simpler and more intuitive computing experience, especially for novice users.
Advantages of All-in-One PCs
Disadvantages of All-in-One PCs
Limited Upgradability: One of the main drawbacks 
of AIOs is their limited upgradability. Unlike 
traditional desktops, where you can easily swap out 
components like the graphics card or RAM, AIOs 
often have components that are soldered onto the 
motherboard, making upgrades difficult or 
impossible.
Space Saving: The integrated design of AIOs 
significantly reduces the footprint on your desk, 
freeing up space for other peripherals or simply 
creating a cleaner workspace.
Reduced Cable Clutter: With all components 
housed within the display unit, AIOs minimize the 
number of cables required, leading to a tidier and 
more organized setup.
Ease of Use: Setting up an AIO is typically a 
breeze, requiring minimal technical knowledge. 
Simply plug in the power cord and you're ready to 
go.
Aesthetics: AIOs are often designed to be visually 
appealing, adding a touch of style to your 
workspace.
Portability: While not as portable as laptops, AIOs 
are relatively easy to move around compared to 
traditional desktops with separate towers.
Higher Cost: AIOs tend to be more expensive than 
similarly configured traditional desktops due to their 
integrated design and specialized components.
Repair Challenges: Repairing AIOs can be more 
challenging than traditional desktops due to the 
integrated nature of the components. Specialized tools 
and expertise may be required, and some repairs may 
necessitate replacing the entire unit.
Performance Limitations: While AIOs have become 
more powerful in recent years, they may still lag 
behind similarly priced traditional desktops in terms of 
raw performance, especially for demanding tasks like 
gaming or video editing.

8. Upon expiry of validity, stoppage or suspension or cancellation of licence, you shall discontinue forthwith the self declaration of conformity to the relevant Indian
Standard(s) and withdraw all promotional and advertising matter which contains any reference thereto.
9. For renewal of licence, the licensee shall have to apply to BIS three months in advance before expiration of the licence and application form for renewal is available on
BIS website.
10. The licence is not transferable. Kindly acknowledge receipt of this letter.
Thanking you,

The guidelines for use of Standard Mark for Scheme-C are per 3(1) of BIS (Conformity Assessment) Regulations,2017 are given below:
i) The monogram of the 'Standard Mark' consists of the pictorial representation, drawn in the exact style as indicated in the figure in the figure in Annexure I. Its photograpic
reductin and enlargement is permitted.
ii)The 'Standard Mark' can be displayed in single colour or multi-colour as per the details given below. The colour scheme for the Standard Mark to be used in multi colur
shall be use as indicated below.
iii) The licensee shall diplay the 'Standard Mark' on the article and/or the packaging, as the case may be, in a manner so as to be easily visible. It shall be legible, indelible
and non-remobable. Further, the durability of marking shall be as per the provisions of the relevant Indian Standard, wherever applicable. The diplay of IS number,
Registration number and words shall not be less than Arial forn size 6.
iv) Any device with a integrated display sceen may present the Standard Mark electronically (e-labelling) in lieu of a physical presentation on the product.

Subject :- Bureau Of Energy Efficiency Voluntary Scheme for Energy Efficiency
labelling ,May 2006., Authorization To use The Label.
Dear Sir,
1.   With Reference to your application submitted to BEE Office for participation in Bureau Of
Energy Efficiency Voluntary Scheme For energy efficiency Labelling May 2006 scheme. The
Bureau here by authorizes you to use the BEE Label strictly in accordance with the provision
of scheme subject to time payment of prescribed fees. The competent authority has authorized
usage of label from 5th May, 2022 . The permission shall be valid from 5th May, 2022 to 20th
April, 2025 .
2.   This authorization carries the rights and obligations stipulated in the scheme. In pursuance
of obligation, you shall pay in due manner and time the scheduled labelling fee as set out in
the scheme. The Bureau shall at any time During the operation of the scheme ,decide to
amend, revise ,modify or terminate the scheme by giving three month prior notice and you will
be bound to comply with such amendment ,revision ,modification within such period , as may
be prescribed by the Bureau.

valid for a period of five (5) years from date of issue with following conditions:
i.
You shall create awareness through media, publications, advertisements, posters or
by any other means of communication;
ii.
You shall file annual returns in the laid down form on the portal on or before 30th day
of June following the financial year to which that returns relates;
iii.
The producer shall fulfil their extended producer responsibility obligations through
online purchase of extended producer responsibility certificate from only those
recyclers having obtained recycler registration certificate from CPCB through the EPR
portal and whose name appears as registered recyclers on the EPR portal
themselves and submit it online by filing quarterly return;
